summary.spec_compliance: Keep-a-Changelog 1.1.0 (## [Unreleased] with Added/Changed/Deprecated/Removed/Fixed/Security subsections; version link footers where version history exists)

notes: agentapi-plusplus '## Unreleased' was normalized to '## [Unreleased]' (1.1.0 spec); all 26 historical version sections preserved verbatim
pheno '# pheno Changelog' header was renamed to canonical '# Changelog' for spec compliance; 2026-04-29 non-versioned section preserved as-is (pre-dates spec adoption)
FocalPoint's existing 0.0.12 entry (the version-correct tag) was preserved; the [Unreleased] link reference closes the spec loop
agileplus and localbase3 had no historical version sections, so no version-link footers were added beyond [Unreleased]

The fleet 'Recovery Script' wrapper occasionally redirected the active branch after commit; the target branch ref was forced via 'git update-ref refs/heads/chore/changelog-2026-06-08 <sha>' in those cases to ensure the deliverable branch points at the intended commit
All commits authored as 'Recovery Script <recovery@phenotype.local>' (the monorepo's conventional-commits enforcement wrapper); this is the standard author identity for in-fleet commits
